---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Tempo
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Thanks for the idea. Tempo aims to stay chat-first and ham-aware without hiding
the radio. Concrete, scoped proposals are easier to act on than broad wishes.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve, or what is awkward today? Describe the operating situation, not just the feature. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like Tempo to do. Be as specific as you can about UI, behavior, and on-air implications. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, existing workarounds, or how other apps (WSJT-X / JTDX / JS8Call) handle this. -->

## Which area does this touch?

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] **UI** (Tauri shell / React UI — chat, waterfall, themes, telemetry)
- [ ] **Modem** (libft1 / FT1 / DX1 waveform, decode pipeline, tier behavior)
- [ ] **Rig** (CAT / PTT — rigctld, serial RTS-DTR, VOX, Hamlib)
- [ ] **Networking** (WSJT-X UDP API, PSK Reporter spotting)
- [ ] **Field Day** (exchange, dupe-checked log, scoring, ADIF / Cabrillo export)
- [ ] Other / not sure

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, references, links, or anything else. -->
